name: tokentopper
description: How much are you really shipping with AI? tokentopper reads your local Claude Code usage, scores a Fancy AI Usage Index, tells you your tier on the tokenmaxxing ladder (are you on the 2027 curve of 5-25B tokens/yr?), and exports a tamper-evident, ed25519-signed signed.json for the openfactoryai.com/tools/tokentopper leaderboard. Private by default; only counts, models, and dates ever leave your machine, never prompts or code.
author: Kalmantic
